steps.t: Dudsig is near the stable in Oserley. Thane Ordlac instructed you to speak with Dudsig, his chief captain, and learn what aid can be given to Oserley …
The brigands' camp is in the fields west of Oserley. Dudsig has asked you to recover stolen goods from the brigands who have stolen from the people of…
Dudsig is near the stable in Oserley, east of the brigands' camp. You should bring the stolen goods back to Dudsig.
